# Customer Due Diligence Requirements

Standard CDD measures required under FATF Recommendation 10. Financial institutions must identify and verify the identity of customers when establishing business relationships.

## Content

CDD applies at account opening, for occasional transactions above threshold, when there is suspicion of ML/TF, and when the institution has doubts about previously obtained identification data.
